item.title: Social Licence to Operate
item.description: Innovate for Sustainability Challenge The Social License to Operate | Junita Van der Colff | TEDxPretoria Overcoming a Lack of Trust: Securing Social License to Operate - ICMM ☀️ GERTUNC

item.title: Quote of the day
item.description: «Je pense donc je suis, car pour penser il est nécessaire d’être.» - René Descartes ☀️ GERTUNC

item.title: Lecture announcement Spring 2020/21
item.description: Dear all, 📢 Starting from Spring 2020/21, there will be new technical elective in our curriculum for 8th Semester called “SOCIAL LICENCE TO OPERATE IN MINING” the course code is MAD434. In this blog, you will find further information on this course. ☀️ GERTUNC

item.title: Quote of the day
item.description: Entrepreneurs: 5 Things We Can Learn From Elon Musk ☀️ GERTUNC

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Dear all, 📢 You will find useful links and lecture notes here on this blog, built for Hacettepe University Mining Engineering Spring 2020-2021 lectures given by me. You can navigate through the “Tags” that are attached to each post in corresponding dates for upcoming lectures. Good luck, ☀️ GERTUNC
